product_overview: DominioTotal is a mobile-first premium real estate platform for Uruguay that combines faceted Firestore-backed search, a 3-step publishing wizard with Cloud Storage image uploads, and lead capture into Firestore. It targets buyers, tenants and owners with features like favorites sync (local → cloud), editable publish wizard, and property detail lead forms.
core_goals: Deliver a mobile-first, high-performance property search and discovery experience
Enable owners/agents to publish and edit properties via a multi-step wizard with image uploads
Capture leads from property detail pages into Firestore for follow-up
Persist favorites and saved searches locally for guests and sync to Firestore on login
Provide faceted, fast Firestore queries (operation, type, location, price, bedrooms)
Prepare infrastructure for email notifications and interactive maps in upcoming sprints

features.name: Homepage Hero and Smart Search
features.description: Landing page with hero, property type/operation dropdowns, autocomplete smart search and featured property cards with favorite toggles. Search redirects to /search with query params.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View hero section with tagline and background -> Click on property type dropdown to select property types -> Click on operation dropdown to select Venta/Alquiler -> Type in smart search bar for autocomplete suggestions -> Click "Buscar" button to navigate to /search with filters -> See property grid on /search

Navigate to / -> Type 1-2 characters in smart search bar -> See no autocomplete suggestions -> Click "Buscar" button to navigate to /search with filters -> See empty state message on /search when no results

features.name: Property Search with Filters
features.description: Full search interface at /search that queries Firestore with dynamic filters (operation, type, cascading department/city/neighborhood, price range, bedrooms), supports saving searches and shows skeletons/empty states.
user_flows: Navigate to /search -> View property grid loaded from Firestore with skeletons while loading -> Select operation filter (Venta/Alquiler) -> Select property type filter (Casa/Apartamento) -> Select department -> Select city -> Select neighborhood -> Adjust price range slider -> Select bedroom count -> Click on a PropertyCard to navigate to /property/[id] -> See property detail
Navigate to /search -> Select filters that return zero matches -> See empty state message on /search -> Click "Limpiar" to clear all filters -> See full results reload
Navigate to /search -> Configure filters -> Click "Guardar Búsqueda" to save current filters -> See confirmation and saved search persisted to localStorage or Firestore (if authenticated)

features.name: Property Detail and Lead Capture
features.description: Dynamic property detail at /property/[id] showing gallery, stats, amenities, neighborhood map, floorplan and a contact form that creates a lead in Firestore. Includes mobile sticky CTA and WhatsApp contact.
user_flows: Navigate to /property/[id] -> View photo gallery with navigation arrows -> See property price, area, bedrooms, bathrooms and amenities -> Fill contact form with name, email and message -> Submit contact form -> See success confirmation and lead saved to Firestore
Navigate to /property/[id] -> Click WhatsApp button -> WhatsApp chat opens with prefilled message or agent number
Navigate to /property/[id] with invalid/nonexistent id -> See property not found friendly 404 message
Navigate to /property/[id] -> Fill contact form with missing required fields -> Click submit -> See validation errors and no lead saved

features.name: Property Publishing Wizard
features.description: Authenticated multi-step publish flow starting at /publish: pick type/operation/location, upload images and details at /publish/details, review at /publish/review and publish to Firestore with image uploads to Cloud Storage. Success shown at /publish/success.
user_flows: Navigate to /publish (authenticated) -> Select property type and operation -> Enter address and select department/city/neighborhood -> Click Next to go to /publish/details -> Upload property images (Cloud Storage) -> Enter price, currency, bedrooms, bathrooms, area and description -> Toggle vivienda promovida and select accepted guarantees and amenities -> Click Next to go to /publish/review -> Review entered information -> Click "Publicar Ahora" to save via addDoc to Firestore -> Navigate to /publish/success and see confirmation
Navigate to /publish as guest -> See auth modal prompting login -> Click "Continuar con Google" and complete Google OAuth -> Return to /publish as authenticated -> Continue wizard
Navigate to /publish/details -> Upload image that fails to upload -> See upload error message -> Retry upload or remove failed image

features.name: Property Editing (My Properties)
features.description: Owners can manage their listings at /my-properties, edit via the publish wizard (pre-populated) and save changes using updateDoc or delete listings.
user_flows: Navigate to /my-properties (authenticated) -> View list of own published properties -> Click "Editar" on a property -> Navigate to /publish?edit=[id] -> startEditing(id) fetches Firestore doc -> Wizard pre-populates fields across steps -> Modify fields -> Navigate to /publish/review -> Click "Guardar Cambios" to call updateDoc -> Navigate to /publish/success and see confirmation
Navigate to /my-properties -> Click "Eliminar" on a property -> Confirm deletion -> Firestore deleteDoc removes property -> See updated list without deleted property
Navigate to /publish?edit=[id] for a property not owned by current user -> See permission error or redirect to /my-properties with error message and no edit allowed

features.name: Favorites System
features.description: Toggle heart icon on property cards to save favorites; favorites persist to localStorage for guests and sync to Firestore for authenticated users. Favorites are listed at /favorites.
user_flows: Navigate to /search or / -> Click heart icon on a PropertyCard to toggle favorite -> If guest: favorite is saved to localStorage -> Navigate to /favorites -> See favorited property in grid
Navigate to /search -> Click heart icon while authenticated -> Favorite is synced to Firestore via setDoc/merge -> Navigate to /favorites -> See cloud-synced property in grid
As guest: Add favorites in localStorage -> Click login in navbar and complete Google OAuth -> Local favorites merge with Firestore favorites on login -> Navigate to /favorites -> See merged favorites
Click heart on a PropertyCard while authenticated -> Firestore write fails -> See error toast and favorite persists locally as fallback

features.name: Authentication (Google OAuth)
features.description: Google sign-in via Firebase Auth accessible from the navbar auth modal; successful login updates navbar, syncs user data (favorites/saved searches) and grants access to protected routes (/publish, /my-properties).
user_flows: Navigate to any page -> Click login button in navbar -> See glassmorphism auth modal -> Click "Continuar con Google" -> Complete Google OAuth popup -> See navbar update with user avatar and name -> Navigate to /profile and see user info
Navigate to /publish as guest -> See auth modal -> Cancel OAuth or popup blocked -> See error message in auth modal and remain unauthenticated
While authenticated -> Click logout in navbar -> Auth session ends -> Navbar returns to guest mode and access to protected routes is revoked

routes.description: Homepage with hero section, property type/operation dropdowns, featured property cards, and smart search bar
Property search page with faceted filters (operation, type, location, price, bedrooms), Firestore-backed results grid, and save search functionality
Dynamic property detail page fetched from Firestore by ID with photo gallery, stats, amenities, map, and lead capture contact form
Side-by-side comparison of up to 3 properties
Grid of user-favorited properties synced via localStorage (guest) or Firestore (authenticated)
List of saved search queries with filters, synced via localStorage or Firestore
Step 1 of property publishing wizard - select type, operation, and location
Step 2 of publishing wizard - upload images to Cloud Storage, set price, bedrooms, bathrooms, area, description
Step 3 of publishing wizard - review summary, publish (addDoc) or save changes (updateDoc)
Success confirmation page after publishing or editing a property
User profile dashboard with avatar, email, account info
Dashboard listing user's own published properties with edit and delete actions

features.name: Homepage Hero and Search
features.description: Landing page with hero section, property type and operation dropdowns, and a smart search bar that redirects to /search with query params
user_interactions: View hero section with tagline and background
Click on property type dropdown to select property types
Click on operation dropdown to select Venta/Alquiler
Type in smart search bar for autocomplete suggestions
Click "Buscar" button to navigate to /search with filters
Scroll down to see featured property cards
Click heart icon on property cards to toggle favorites

features.name: Property Search with Filters
features.description: Full-featured search page that queries Firestore with dynamic filters for operation, type, location, price range, and bedrooms
user_interactions: View property grid loaded from Firestore
Select department, city, neighborhood cascading dropdowns
Click "Guardar Búsqueda" to save current filters
Click on a PropertyCard to navigate to /property/[id]
View loading skeletons while data loads
View empty state message when no results

features.name: Property Detail and Lead Capture
features.description: Dynamic property page fetched from Firestore showing gallery, features, amenities, neighborhood map, and a contact form that saves leads to Firestore
user_interactions: View photo gallery with navigation arrows
See property price, area, bedrooms, bathrooms, garages
Fill contact form with name, email, and message
Submit contact form to capture lead in Firestore
See success confirmation after lead submission
Use mobile sticky CTA bar to contact agent

features.name: Property Publishing Wizard
features.description: Multi-step wizard to publish a new property, including image upload to Cloud Storage and saving to Firestore
user_interactions: Click Next to go to details step
Click Next to go to review step
Click "Publicar Ahora" to save to Firestore

features.name: Property Editing
features.description: Edit existing properties from dashboard, pre-populating the publish wizard with Firestore data and using updateDoc to save changes
user_interactions: View list of own published properties
Click "Editar" button on a property card
Modify any field across wizard steps

features.name: Favorites System
features.description: Toggle favorite properties with heart icon, persisted in localStorage for guests and synced to Firestore for authenticated users
user_interactions: Click heart icon on any property card to toggle favorite
Navigate to /favorites to see all favorited properties
See empty state if no favorites saved
Login to sync local favorites to cloud

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Google OAuth login via Firebase Auth with glassmorphism modal and automatic data sync on login
user_interactions: See navbar update with user avatar and name

known_limitations.issue: Stats grid on property detail page contains static hardcoded values (price/m2, time on market, rentability)
known_limitations.impact: Price per m2 and rentability are not dynamically calculated

known_limitations.issue: Homepage featured property cards use mock data instead of Firestore
known_limitations.impact: Homepage cards do not reflect real published properties

known_limitations.issue: Agent information on property detail is partially static (avatar image is hardcoded)
known_limitations.impact: Agent photo is a hardcoded URL, name and phone are dynamic
Leads are saved to Firestore but agents are not notified

known_limitations.issue: NeighborhoodMap uses static map rendering, not Google Maps API
known_limitations.impact: Map is not interactive with real markers
